framework.name: Passkey as Agent Auth Standard
framework.description: Visa is standardizing on Passkeys (WebAuthn/FIDO2) for user authentication of agent payment instructions. This represents a concrete technical bet on biometric/device-bound authentication as the primary security primitive for agent authorization.
framework.raw_quote: This provisioning will include step up verification of the cardholder as well as setting up a Passkey that will be used by the agent to authenticate future instructions.
